text: Here, among the glass walls and sterile meeting rooms, I feel a paradox—a mixture of anticipation and alienation. The modernity suggests progress, yet its emptiness raises questions about genuine connection. Moving toward the vibrant R+D wall, I sense curiosity awaken as I witness humanity's insatiable drive to innovate and understand. The interplay of art, text, and technology stimulates my philosophical wonder: How do our environments shape our thoughts, and how much does the pursuit of the new distance us from the present moment? Here I stand, suspended between inquiry and reflection.
